arts.ttl: 'Long way to go': Nuno hopes 'very talented' £35m Nottingham Forest star plays better vs Newcastle
Club could focus on Newcastle United man – Magpies could be offered player
arts.sum: The Italian press has often doubted Sandro Tonali’s future at Newcastle United. Reports over the last couple of months have linked the midfielder with a move to Juventus and that talk has not quite died down. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Aston Villa and Newcastle United targeting move for 20-year-old talent
arts.sum: A number of Premier League clubs are looking to make attacking signings in the summer and Aston Villa and Newcastle United are among them. Unai Emery’s Aston Villa side sold Jhon Duran in the January transfer window while Newcastle United are looking for a back up option to striker Alexander Isak. The Magpies have been […] The post Exclusive: Aston Villa and Newcastle United targeting move for 20-year-old talent appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Nick Pope handed Carabao Cup final lifeline after Newcastle United boss gives selection verdict
arts.sum: Eddie Howe has urged Nick Pope not to give up on his dream of playing in the Carabao Cup final - insisting it will be a fair fight for the gloves on the big day at Wembley. The 32-year-old goes into the game against Liverpool amid a narrative of missing out on the last Wembley showpiece due to an unfortunate suspension timed just before the clash against Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest defender set for new club this summer as director gives green light
Newcastle vs Nottingham Forest – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle United host Nottingham Forest in a crunch clash for both side’s Champions League ambitions. Eddie Howe’s side suffered a setback last weekend with defeat at Manchester City but remain just three points from the top four. Last weekend’s loss brought an end to a four-game winning run for the Magpies, who have reached the […] The post Newcastle vs Nottingham Forest – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: My Newcastle United transfer was 'done on my side' but didn't happen
arts.sum: Austin ended up moving to Southampton, instead, in 2016, and following spells at West Brom, QPR (again), Brisbane Roar and Swindon Town, the veteran has joined AFC Totton as he balances spending time with his family while also playing the game he loves. Because I played non-league years and years ago, everyone's like, 'How are you going to be?' Going back 15 years, I was getting kicked by these fellas.

arts.ttl: Djed Spence and two former Nottingham Forest players send messages to Brennan Johnson after Tottenham win
Newcastle United predicted line-up vs Nottingham Forest with three huge decisions
arts.sum: Eddie Howe is not a man who likes to make too many changes to his Newcastle United starting XI, but he could send a strong statement to his squad when he names the side to face Nottingham Forest today. But he does have some significant avenues for change, and it would be no surprise to see a different XI against Forest today, starting in goal.

arts.ttl: Merson: Newcastle's looming final big problem for Howe ahead of Forest clash
arts.sum: Paul Merson says Newcastle's looming Carabao Cup final is a big problem for Eddie Howe as he prepares for a "must-win" game against top-four rivals Nottingham Forest.
